debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn✝ : 2 ≤ n
points : Fin n → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2) × EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
hpoints : ∀ (i : Fin n), (points i).1 ≠ (points i).2
interAlong : Fin n → Fin (n - 1) ↪o ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)
interBtw : (i : Fin n) → { j // i ≠ j } ≃ Fin (n - 1)
lineMap_eq_iff :
  ∀ (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) (ri rj : ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)),
    (lineMap (points i).1 (points i).2) ↑ri = (lineMap (points j).1 (points j).2) ↑rj ↔
      ri = (interAlong i) ((interBtw i) ⟨j, hij⟩) ∧ rj = (interAlong j) ((interBtw j) ⟨i, ⋯⟩)
clap : Bool → Fin (n - 1) → Fin (n - 1)
clap_def : ∀ (b : Bool), clap b = if b = true then Fin.rev else _root_.id
hn : Odd n
⊢ ∃ F,
    ∀ (f g : Fin n),
      f ≠ g →
        (F f).1 ≠ (F g).1 ∧
          ∀ (t : Fin (n - 1)),
            (lineMap (points (F f).1).1 (points (F f).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F f).1) (clap (F f).2 t)) ≠
              (lineMap (points (F g).1).1 (points (F g).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F g).1) (clap (F g).2 t))

failed_attempts:
let idx (i j : Fin n) : ℕ := if h : i = j then 0 else interBtw i ⟨j, h⟩
  let B (i j : Fin n) : ℕ := (idx i j + idx j i + 1) % 2
  have hB_symm (i j : Fin n) : B i j = B j i := by
    dsimp [B]; rw [Nat.add_comm (idx i j)]
  have parity_sum (i j k : Fin n) : (B i j + B j k + B k i) % 2 = 0 := by
    -- We use a geometric argument: for any line x, it cuts the boundary of triangle ijk
    -- an even number of times. The sum of B terms mod 2 corresponds to the sum of
    -- these cuts plus the "internal" intersections of i, j, k.
    -- Internal sum is 3 (1+1+1). External sum is 0. Total 3 == 1 mod 2?
    -- Wait, B_ij = K_ij + K_ji + 1. Sum B = Sum (K+K) + 3.
    -- Sum (K+K) = 1 (internal) + 0 (external) = 1.
    -- Total = 1 + 3 = 4 = 0 mod 2. Correct.
    -- We assume the geometric property that a line cuts a closed cycle even times.
    sorry
  let d (i : Fin n) : Bool := (∑ j, B i j) % 2 == 1
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, d i), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  have hseg : f ≠ g := hfg
  simp only [ne_eq, Prod.mk.injEq, true_and]
  constructor
  · exact hfg
  · intro t H
    rw [lineMap_eq_iff] at H
    obtain ⟨H1, H2⟩ := H f g hfg _ _
    have h1 : clap (d f) t = interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ := interAlong.injective H1
    have h2 : clap (d g) t = interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := interAlong.injective H2
    let df := if d f then 1 else 0
    let dg := if d g then 1 else 0
    have hc (b : Bool) : (clap b t : ℕ) ≡ t + (if b then 1 else 0) [MOD 2] := by
      rw [clap_def]; split_ifs
      · -- Fin.rev t = n - 2 - t. Since n is odd, n-2 is odd. n-2-t == 1-t == 1+t.
        simp only [Fin.val_rev, Fin.val_last];
        have : n - 1 - 1 - t = n - 2 - t := rfl
        rw [this]
        have ho : (n - 2) % 2 = 1 := by
          rcases hnodd with ⟨k, rfl⟩
          rw [Nat.add_sub_assoc, Nat.mul_add]; simp; exact le_trans (by norm_num) hn
        rw [Nat.sub_mod_eq_add_mod_of_le (Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (Nat.add_le_add_left (Fin.is_lt t) _))]
        rw [ho]; rfl
      · simp
    have c1 : (idx f g : ℕ) ≡ t + df [MOD 2] := by
      simp [idx, hfg]; rw [← h1]; exact hc (d f)
    have c2 : (idx g f : ℕ) ≡ t + dg [MOD 2] := by
      simp [idx, hfg.symm]; rw [← h2]; exact hc (d g)
    have sum_c : (idx f g + idx g f : ℕ) ≡ df + dg [MOD 2] := by
      rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_mod_eq c1, Nat.mod_eq_of_mod_eq c2]
      simp [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm]
    have B_val : B f g = (idx f g + idx g f + 1) % 2 := rfl
    have d_sum : (df + dg) % 2 = B f g := by
      have S (i : Fin n) : (∑ j, B i j) % 2 = df := by sorry -- follows from def of d
      -- d f + d g = sum_j B f j + sum_j B g j
      -- = B f g + B g f + sum_{j != f, g} (B f j + B g j)
      -- sum_{j != f, g} (B f j + B g j) = sum_{j} B f g = (n-2) B f g = B f g
      -- total = 2 B f g + B f g = 3 B f g = B f g.
      sorry
    rw [← d_sum] at B_val
    rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_mod_eq sum_c] at B_val
    have contra : (df + dg + 1) % 2 = (df + dg) % 2 := B_val.symm
    revert contra; simp; intro h
    exact Nat.succ_ne_self _ h
